settings.heading: Gift Wrapping Available
settings.content:
Make it extra special — add our premium gift wrapping at checkout. Your item will be beautifully presented in tissue paper inside a branded ModernTimez gift box, tied with a satin ribbon.

You can also include a personal message (up to 200 characters) printed on a gift card — perfect for any occasion. We never include pricing or invoices in gift shipments.

settings.heading: Shipping & Delivery
settings.content:
All orders are processed within 1–2 business days.

  • Standard shipping: 5–10 business days
  • Express shipping: 2–3 business days (available at checkout)
  • International: 10–21 business days

A tracking number is emailed to you as soon as your order ships.

settings.heading: Returns & Exchanges
settings.content:
We accept returns within 30 days of delivery for items in their original, unused condition. Returns are free — we provide a prepaid return label.

Personalized or custom items are non-returnable. Refunds are processed within 3–5 business days of receiving the returned item.

Read our full returns policy

settings.heading: Why This Makes a Great Gift
settings.content:
Not sure if this is the right choice? Here's why our customers love giving ModernTimez products as gifts:

  • Beautifully presented and ready to give
  • Unique and contemporary — you won't find this at a generic retailer
  • Made to last — this is a gift they'll use and remember
  • Ships directly to the recipient, with no pricing included

Still not sure? Ask us for personal gift advice — it's free and we love helping.

settings.title: Reliable Shipping
settings.text: Choose from available shipping options at checkout. A tracking number is emailed as soon as your order ships.

settings.title: Gift Wrapping Available
settings.text: Add beautiful gift wrapping at checkout. We'll wrap it perfectly and include your personal message — ready to give.

settings.title: 30-Day Easy Returns
settings.text: Not the right fit? We offer hassle-free returns within 30 days. Free prepaid return labels provided.
